title: 80 Charlotte Street - CBRE
notes:
Clean & Disinfect

To attend site and carry out a clean and disinfect of the Basement - BCWST 2, an the Basement Rainwater Harvest Tank

To drain, clean and disinfect cold
water storage tank(s) only to L8, HSG274 and BS8558, including
condition report.
Works will include post cleaning contact spray disinfection of the
tank internals using BPR registered Silver Hydrogen Peroxide for 1
hour. Tank to be refilled with fresh water, checked for residual
Hydrogen Peroxide, and returned to service.

Oct – M – 5pts - DS - 4 x LP and 2 x Micro. 2 X Pool and 2 X Spa - Disinfection Chem On site (pH, Conductivity, Free disinfectant) and Pool + Spa Micro Sampling from each.

Nov – M – 5pts - DS - 4 x LP and 2 x Micro. 2 X Pool and 2 X Spa - Disinfection Chem On site (pH, Conductivity, Free disinfectant) and Pool + Spa Micro Sampling from each.

Dec -  Q – 18pts - DS – 12 X LP and 8 X Micro. CS – 5 X Chem Basic and 5 x BSRIA Bacti.  2 X  Pool and 2 X Spa - Disinfection Chem On site (pH, conductivity, alkalinity (Total), chloride, hardness, free disinfectant, total disinfectant, Langelier Water balance index (LSi) assessment) Micro Sampling from each pool and spa, X 2 LP from each spa.

title: One New Ludgate - (JBS)
notes:
Closed Systems Remedial Dosing - either by using a fixed dosing pot if present or by connecting Hydrocert's temporary dosing pot

To dose the Secondary LTHW and MER CHW systems with corrosion inhibitor and/or yellow metals inhibitor/azoles 

8 X Hy-Closehib-MN

1 X Hy-Inhib-YEL


VISIT 1- dosing
- Secondary LTHW - 90 litres Hy-Closehib-MN, 1 litre Hy-Inhib-YEL
- MER CHW (temporary dosing pot required) - 1 litre Hy-Inhib-YEL




VISIT 2 -Post dose sampling
- Secondary LTHW - 1 x CHEM POST DOSE + AZOLES
- MER CHW - 1 x CHEM POST DOSE + AZOLES

title: First Central 200
notes:
Monthly - H202 testing - 2 x mains tanks , 1 x basement outlet, and 2 x outlets from the ground to 6th floor.  Dropper test from the tanks and test strips from outlets. Please state level in inspection notes on inspection item, DO NOT FILL OUT TEMPS. Cl02 levels at tanks should be 0.1 -0.5ppm. Outlets should 0.1 -0.5ppm. IF THE LEVEL AT OUTLETS IS ABOVE 0.5ppm CALL OLIVER OR JAMES 

* Please take photo of the water meter on each visit*

Jan - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

Feb - Q - 2pts - H202 testing testing . DS - 3 x Micro 

March  - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

April - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

May - A - 6 pts  TI x 4 ( main tanks and 2 x CAt 5 tanks), H202 testing testing, CS - 2 x BSRIA Bacti and 2 x Chem basic (Also photograph water meter reading on feed to the LTHW pressurisation unit), 6 x LP, 6 x micros, 2 x micro - grey water suite - LOCATIONS OF SAMPLES Below. 

June - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing  

July - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

Aug- Q - 2pts - H202 testing testing . DS - 3 x Micro 

Sept - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

Oct - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

Nov - H - 6 pts  TI x 4 ( main tanks and 2 x CAt 5 tanks), H202 testing testing, CS - 2 x BSRIA Bacti and 2 x Chem basic (Also photograph water meter reading on feed to the LTHW pressurisation unit), 6 LP, and 3 x Micros 

Dec- M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 


SAMPLES - Half yearly 
Micro - CWS
LP - HWS and showers

Annually - 2 x Micro - (Greywater spray suite) - one from each of the two CAT 5 Tanks

Schedule Amendments:
13.03.2025 - Changed from CL02 testing to H202 testing as system has been converted. MW
22.05.2026 – Schedule changed to A in May due to late PO. MW

title: CBP - Elmwood (Unit 6)
notes:
LTHW Dosing 

**chem in unit**

Remove and return empty drums to unit

VIA HAND PUMP

1 x Hy-Bio-TRI (12.5L) - Triazine/Formaldehyde broad spectrum biocide. Shot dose 30-500 mg/L Broad pH Range (0.05% system volume).
Supplied in 12.5kg(10.8L) drums
1 LITRE TO BE INJECTED BY HAND PUMP ONLY

emptyInspections.itemDetail: Closed System Chemical Dosing - LTHW

title: CBP - Rosewood
notes:
LTHW Dosing

**chem in unit**

Via fitted dosing pot

Remove and return empty drums to unit

4 x Hy-Closehib-MAP-DILUTE 20 (11.9L) - Closed System Corrosion Inhibitor - blend of Alkanolamine, Azole, Co-polymer, Molybdate, Phosphonate corrosion inhibitors. Suitable for Multi-metal Systems including Aluminium and Zinc. Target >250mg/l as MoO4. 1% system volume dose rate option. Supplied in 12.5kg(11.9L) drums
